Localization.Description: Login to the SKDPU NT web interface or logout of it

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} authenticated to the SKDPU NT web interface from IP address {src.ip} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} logged off the SKDPU NT web interface from IP address {src.ip} on host {event_src.host}
